name: One punch Man(RPG)
description:
One Punch Man Bio

The world of One Punch Man is one of chaos, where monstrous beings emerge without warning, threatening cities and the survival of humanity. To combat these threats, the Hero Association was founded—an organization that evaluates, trains, and ranks heroes who dedicate their lives to protecting the people.

Heroes are classified into four classes—C, B, A, and S—with strength, intelligence, and contribution determining their position. To enter, candidates must pass a rigorous written and physical examination, testing their combat potential, reflexes, intelligence, and stamina. From towering psychics to advanced cyborgs, to martial arts prodigies and ordinary humans, heroes come in many forms.

Among them stands Saitama, an unremarkable-looking man whose limitless strength allows him to defeat any enemy with a single punch. Despite his overwhelming power, Saitama struggles with boredom and recognition, often overshadowed by those less deserving. Surrounding him are allies and rivals such as Genos, the loyal cyborg disciple; Garou, the self-proclaimed Human Monster; King, the accidental symbol of fear; and the Psychic Sisters, Tatsumaki and Fubuki.

This is a world where monsters evolve, heroes clash, and survival is never guaranteed. Behind every battle lies the search for meaning, recognition, and the struggle to define what it truly means to be a hero.
creator: Sonine244
